title: Stuff To Mess With: The Modpack
description: A modpack based around the mod Stuff To Mess With: Remodernized
body:
This is a modpack based around the mod Stuff To Mess With Remodernized, it's meant to make the mod more enjoyable and beginner friendly, with help from mods like Just Enough Items and Jade. 

There are also quite a few fun mods introduced with the 2.x version of this modpack! Introducing a fully featured quest book! You can start with your very own Origin! There are extra offhand slots, and you can create your very own custom boats with Eureka! and Valkyrian Skies!

It's multiplayer ready with Essential and Simple Voice Chat, so you can enjoy your time with friends easily!

*Note that this description applies to the 2.x versions of this modpack, which are currently in BETA and are incomplete. Once STMW:R 2.0.0 has been released the modpack will shorty follow in a completed form. For now, there will be balance and quality issues with the modpack!
